headline: Steel Dynamics (STLD) Stock After 89% Gain Is There Still Value Here
summary: If you are wondering whether Steel Dynamics is still priced attractively after a strong run, this breakdown will help you understand what the current share price might be implying. The stock closed at US$245.49, with returns of 39.4% year to date and 89.6% over the past year, even though it has declined 1.8% over the last week and 4.9% over the past month. Recent coverage of Steel Dynamics has focused on its position in the U.S. steel sector and how investors are reacting to shifting...

headline: Does Steel Dynamics’ Lower Q2 EPS Guidance Reframe Its Margin Expansion Story for STLD Investors?
summary: Earlier this month, Steel Dynamics, Inc. issued second-quarter 2026 earnings guidance, projecting US$3.51 to US$3.55 in diluted EPS, below prior analyst expectations and prompting a reassessment of near-term performance. This guidance, coming just weeks before the company’s upcoming results, contrasts with previously upbeat analyst sentiment and highlights the sensitivity of expectations to even modest revisions. We’ll now examine how this lower-than-expected earnings guidance interacts with...
